judgements.reason: US state agent-as-first-class-identity statute thesis (target Q3 2026) remains supported by Cisco $400M Astrix M&A on May 4 (NHI control-plane M&A primitive) plus Microsoft Agent 365 GA + CSA first-pillar framing. Recent VR observed_relevance has dipped (1-3) but no contradict-direction evidence in last 7 days; landing window (2026-09-30) is still ~5 months out.
All bridge entries from past week carry support_direction='support'. No retraction observed. The May 4 Cisco/Astrix bridge directly reinforces the NHI statute thesis as a procurement-tier signal.
Need actors (state legislatures, NIST, Cisco, Microsoft) all remain active; no actor exits. No need has been satisfied to flip to done — statute itself is the landing event.

5 new chain edges + 6 parallel relation edges added 2026-05-05 (linkages with .a2dde9d6, .7db9cba2, .99f1f0a5, .5094f95c, .c850d46b, plus parallel ties to .5f44afb9, .a3d8484a, .88da40c4, .08513eaa, .fe9e4605). All edges add structure rather than invalidate existing chain logic; none describe contradiction.
